summary: Completed comprehensive testing of School dashboard redesign and interest/admin features. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - dashboard hierarchy correctly shows Il mio percorso at top, open enrolments banner top-right, welcome card left with warm coaching tone signed by Emanuele/Arianna/Emanuele, Dalla bacheca right, Prossime occasioni below with featured program. Faces of the Community REMOVED. Training Courses page shows Italian titles, course cards open detail page. Interest saving works and persists. Admin summary displays interested/confirmed/enrolled counts with prospects and inline status update.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard layout hierarchy correctly implemented: Il mio percorso (top) + Open enrolments banner (top-right) > Welcome card (left) + Dalla bacheca (right) > Prossime occasioni with featured program
Welcome card has warm professional coaching tone signed by 'Un saluto da Emanuele, Arianna e Emanuele' with 3 strategic CTA links
Faces of the Community section successfully removed from dashboard
Italian copy used throughout: 'Corsi di formazione', 'Prossime occasioni', 'Dalla bacheca'
Course interest flow works: POST saves interest, GET detail returns current_user_status
Admin summary shows prospects (users without edition) with inline status dropdown
Deep-link to Users admin works via ?userId= query parameter
Bulk installments area shows 'template rapidi' reference, quick template buttons appear when enrolled participants exist
seed_data_creation: Interest record created for repo_check_user on cat_tec3 course (status: confirmed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: School dashboard redesign complete. Key verifications: (1) Il mio percorso at top shows progress (0/10 corsi completati), (2) Open enrolments banner top-right with 'Core Coaching Program 2026 - Iscrizioni aperte!', (3) Welcome card left with warm tone signed by Emanuele/Arianna/Emanuele + 3 CTAs, (4) Dalla bacheca right with recent posts, (5) Prossime occasioni with featured program card, (6) Faces of Community removed, (7) Course interest saves and shows status box on reload, (8) Admin course detail shows Vista amministrativa with counts and prospects, (9) Inline status dropdowns work for both prospects and edition members, (10) Deep-link to Users admin via ?userId= works.

features_verified.dashboard_hierarchy_il_mio_percorso_top: PASS - journey-summary-card at top with progress info
features_verified.dashboard_hierarchy_welcome_card_left: PASS - school-welcome-card with warm coaching tone
features_verified.dashboard_welcome_card_signature: PASS - Signed by 'Un saluto da Emanuele, Arianna e Emanuele'
features_verified.dashboard_featured_program_card: PASS - featured-program-card with CTA to course page
features_verified.faces_of_community_removed: PASS - Section not present in dashboard
features_verified.training_course_cards_open_detail: PASS - 'Apri scheda corso' buttons navigate to /course/{id}
features_verified.course_detail_interest_status_persists: PASS - After saving, shows 'Interesse già registrato' with status box
features_verified.course_detail_admin_prospects_section: PASS - course-admin-prospects-card for users without edition
features_verified.training_courses_admin_tabs: PASS - Catalogo, Operatività corsi, Scadenze pagamenti
